reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark only claims with replayable deterministic evidence satisfied. Reclassify the named-adapter compare-report persistence claim because existing product proof shows review consumption of persisted artifacts, not ownership of compare-report file creation.

unresolvedQuestions: Should Cautilus own generation of compare-report.md/json from eval-test commands, or should named host adapters own persisting those files before Cautilus consumes them?
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Existing deterministic tests prove that persisted report artifacts and comparison questions can be carried into report/review/prompt packets, but they do not prove that named adapter eval-test commands themselves persist compare-report.md and compare-report.json.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Decide the ownership boundary. If Cautilus should own file materialization, add a product command/test for compare-report.md/json creation; if adapters own it, rewrite this as adapter author guidance and keep Cautilus proof on consuming declared report artifacts.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the final deterministic evidence bundle: persona_prompt live-run smoke now asserts product-owned request, simulator, turn, transcript, and result packet boundaries while backend selection remains adapter-owned.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep persona_prompt packet-boundary assertions aligned with live-run invocation schema changes.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by review-variant CLI smoke tests: blocked variants preserve machine-readable reason codes and concrete reasons, and unavailable executors become blocked unavailable_executor packets.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep blocked review variant tests strict about reasonCodes and concrete reason fields.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runner readiness tests: commit drift with unchanged adapter and runner hashes is exposed as fresh-with-head-drift provenance without marking the assessment stale; doctor and agent status consume the same readiness state.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep runner readiness provenance tests aligned when assessment freshness semantics change.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the final deterministic evidence bundle: the adapter excludes docs/specs/old/** and docs/claims/**, and the claim discovery test proves excluded linked Markdown cannot enter sourceInventory or claimCandidates.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep active claim discovery excludes explicit when adding archived or superseded claim-doc locations.
